title: Blockshirts & Reds
description: Introduces a collection of communist-inspired foods, decorative banners, and stylized items to enrich your world with bold aesthetics.
body:
Blockshirts & Reds is a Minecraft mod that brings a bold, stylized collection of communist-inspired content into your world. It introduces new foods like hearty borscht and savory pelmeni, along with five unique banner-style paintings that add strong visual character to your builds.

The mod is currently in alpha, with more features, items, and visual content planned for future updates, and there are currently no plans to port it to Fabric.
